title: quota_get returns GetResponse<Quota> not Vec<Quota>: correct and forward-compatible
description: Returns full GetResponse<Quota> including state token. A contributor might suggest simplifying to Vec<Quota> to avoid 'boilerplate'. Reject: the state token is required for future Quota/changes delta sync support; dropping it now would be a breaking API change when Quota/changes is added. All other */get methods return GetResponse<T>; the previous Vec<Quota> was the anomaly.
